title: tilia × cinerascens
intro: Tilia × cinerascens, also known as the silver linden or silver-leaved lime, is a hybrid plant of the Tilia genus, specifically a cross between Tilia platyphyllos and Tilia cordata. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which contribute to its health benefits. The health benefits of Tilia × cinerascens include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and soothing respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Tilia × cinerascens can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
